title: Marketplace Manager - Dishis Designer Jewellery - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Dishis Designer Jewellery - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, Dishis Designer Jewellery in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery:
Dishis Designer Jewellery is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery!
